changes.text: Task labels & tags — colour-coded label chips on Kanban cards with inline add/remove input
8 additional microservices shipped: accounts, contacts, opportunities, activities, automation, integrations, reporting, and search
Accounts and Contacts pages with full CRUD UI connected to live CRM services
GitHub Actions CI integration for automatic Fly.io deploys on push
19 new roadmap items across Core, AI, Integrations, Automation, and UX categories
Docker builds updated to rust:latest with workspace-root build context for edition2024 support
All services use SqliteConnectOptions::create_if_missing for reliable first-boot on Fly.io volumes
Story points computed live from task status — removed localStorage accumulation
Changelog, Roadmap, Stats, Keyboard Shortcuts, and Integrations sections
Toggle task checkbox now syncs status field (done / todo) in the same request
AI planner status banner hidden on idle; shown only after first interaction
Remove All Tasks moved out of header into de-emphasised view-controls row
How It Works cards unified to amber accent with opacity progression
Feature illustration SVGs redesigned to communicate features directly
FAQ answer text enlarged for better readability on dark backgrounds
Tier bars now include a ? link to the Tiers reference page
Migrated AI backend from OpenRouter to Anthropic Claude SDK (claude-haiku-4-5)
Iterative plan refinement — remove individual tasks, add feedback, regenerate
Step count selector (3 – 15 tasks) defaulting to 7
Sub-page routing for Tiers and Guide pages via hash-based router
LLM_RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED error code with user-facing rate-limit message
Highlights section reduced to 4 unique feature cards with purpose-built SVGs
Professional dark zinc theme with amber/emerald/purple accent palette
Kanban board view with To Do / In Progress / Done columns
Writing tiers: Poem → Paragraph → Short Story → Novel → Epic
Admin dashboard with request logs and user activity
Goal-based task grouping with per-goal progress bars
Board and list views with search, filter, and sort controls
Duplicate SVGs in Highlights cards resolved
AI-assisted goal planning via orchestrator microservice
Task difficulty with story point values (1 – 6 SP)
JWT-based authentication with subject and role management
CMS integration for site content, FAQ, and Highlights
SQLite persistence with schema migrations via sqlx
Initial release: task CRUD, list view, and manual task creation
Rust/Axum backend with SQLite, React 19 + Tailwind v3 frontend
Fly.io deployment configuration for all three microservices
